message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'seq_commit' sets signal field 'seq_file.count', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=seq_file;field=count;offset=24] [oracle:assert=seq_file.count stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets count without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
